positive: A cozy, vintage-inspired illustration of a small, rustic library scene. Sunlight streams through a large arched window, illuminating dust motes and casting warm shadows on stacks of old, leather-bound books. A plush armchair sits in the corner next to a steaming cup of tea and a pair of reading glasses. The style should be reminiscent of classic storybook etching and pen and ink drawing, with soft sepia and cream tones. Warm lighting, deep depth of field, nostalgic, hygge aesthetic, intricate detail, literary, masterwork.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, modern furniture, bright colors, digital painting, harsh edges
